description:
Advances: mutagen.cli

Deliverable:
- Mix task skeleton at `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex` (module `Mix.Tasks.Mutagen`)
  with a private dispatch table so the state machine error paths can be
  unit-tested by injecting fake collaborators.
- CLI parser at `lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex` (module `MutagenEx.CLI`) using
  `OptionParser` only â€” no external CLI dependency. Parses `--scope` (repeatable),
  `--tests` (repeatable), `--timeout-ms <int>`, `--seed <int>`, `--json <path>`.
- Config struct at `lib/mutagen_ex/config.ex` (module `MutagenEx.Config`).
- Types module at `lib/mutagen_ex/types.ex` (module `MutagenEx.Types`) holding
  shared `@type` definitions (e.g., `%MutationSite{}`, `%Report{}`).
- Project scaffolding: confirm `mix.exs` is the v1 shape (Elixir ~> 1.16, no
  third-party deps), `.formatter.exs` follows community default, `.gitignore`
  covers `_build/`, `deps/`, `cover/`, `erl_crash.dump`. Delete any committed
  `erl_crash.dump`.
- `test/test_helper.exs` configured for ExUnit.
- README skeleton (full content lands in S8).

Verification:
- Tests to pass: `mix test test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs`. Covers
  spec-verification stubs `mutagen.cli.v1`, `mutagen.cli.v2`,
  `mutagen.cli.v4` (the `mix help mutagen` stub).
- Behaviors to demonstrate: scenarios `mutagen.cli.s1` through `mutagen.cli.s9`
  in `.spec/specs/cli.spec.md`, plus `OptionParser` edge cases (repeated
  `--scope`, negative integers in `--timeout-ms`).
- `mix compile --warnings-as-errors` must be clean.

Out of Scope (files):
- `lib/mutagen_ex/coverage_runner.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/baseline.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_runner.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutators/**`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/scope_resolver.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/test_selector.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/mutation_enumerator.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/json_reporter.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/ast_cache.ex`
- `test/fixtures/**`
- `test/mutagen_ex/integration/**`

Allowed touches (this stage may modify):
- `mix.exs`
- `.formatter.exs`
- `.gitignore`
- `README.md` (skeleton only)
- `lib/mix/tasks/mutagen.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/cli.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/config.ex`
- `lib/mutagen_ex/types.ex`
- `test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs`
- `test/test_helper.exs`

Out of Scope (intent):
- No implementation of any pipeline phase. The mix task dispatches to
  collaborators that don't exist yet; integration tests for the orchestration
  state machine live in S6.
- No third-party deps. No `nimble_options`, no `optimus`.
- Do not implement scope or test target parsing here beyond storing the raw
  strings on `%Config{}`. Validation and resolution live in S3a / S3b.

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly with `--warnings-as-errors`
- [ ] `mix test test/mutagen_ex/cli_test.exs` passes
- [ ] Spec verification passes (`mutagen.cli.v1`, `.v2`, `.v4`)
- [ ] Scope check: diff touches only Allowed globs (mechanical)
- [ ] Auditor APPROVE comment on the ticket
title: S1: Scaffold + CLI + Config + Types
